'''âng-th-m''' ('''kangatham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hilt|hilt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hilt|hilt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-th-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangatham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingatham|thingatham]] || [[word:jingatham|jingatham]] || [[word:shingatham|shingatham]] || [[word:kingatham|kingatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungatham|thuthungatham]] || [[word:jujungatham|jujungatham]] || [[word:shushungatham|shushungatham]] || [[word:kukungatham|kukungatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungatham|thungatham]] || [[word:jungatham|jungatham]] || [[word:shungatham|shungatham]] || [[word:kungatham|kungatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungatham|thungatham]] || [[word:jungatham|jungatham]] || [[word:shungatham|shungatham]] || [[word:kungatham|kungatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengatham|thengatham]] || [[word:jengatham|jengatham]] || [[word:shengatham|shengatham]] || [[word:kengatham|kengatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongatham|thothongatham]] || [[word:jojongatham|jojongatham]] || [[word:shoshongatham|shoshongatham]] || [[word:kokongatham|kokongatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatham|thongatham]] || [[word:jongatham|jongatham]] || [[word:shongatham|shongatham]] || [[word:kongatham|kongatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatham|thongatham]] || [[word:jongatham|jongatham]] || [[word:shongatham|shongatham]] || [[word:kongatham|kongatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngatham|thĂŠngatham]] || [[word:jĂŠngatham|jĂŠngatham]] || [[word:shĂŠngatham|shĂŠngatham]] || [[word:kĂŠngatham|kĂŠngatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangatham|thathangatham]] || [[word:jajangatham|jajangatham]] || [[word:shashangatham|shashangatham]] || [[word:kakangatham|kakangatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangatham|thangatham]] || [[word:jangatham|jangatham]] || [[word:shangatham|shangatham]] || [[word:kangatham|kangatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangatham|thangatham]] || [[word:jangatham|jangatham]] || [[word:shangatham|shangatham]] || [[word:kangatham|kangatham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangatham|shangatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangatham|goshangatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangatham|gokishangatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangathamnĂŒ|shangathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangathamnknĂŒ|goshangathamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathamnĂŒ|gokishangathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangathamshĂ«|shangathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangathamnkshĂ«|goshangathamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangathamshĂ«|gokishangathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathamro|shangathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathamnkro|goshangathamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathamro|gokishangathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathamu|shangathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathamnkmu|goshangathamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathamu|gokishangathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangathamsher|shangathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangathamnksher|goshangathamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangathamsher|gokishangathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangathamng|shangathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangathamnkng|goshangathamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangathamng|gokishangathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangathamya|shangathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangathamnkya|goshangathamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangathamya|gokishangathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangathamyam|shangathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangathamnkyam|goshangathamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangathamyam|gokishangathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangathamnĂŒshĂ«|shangathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangathamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangathamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangathamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathamnĂŒro|shangathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathamnknĂŒro|goshangathamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathamnĂŒro|gokishangathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathamnĂŒmu|shangathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathamnknĂŒmu|goshangathamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathamnĂŒmu|gokishangathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangathamshĂ«nĂŒ|shangathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathamshĂ«ro|shangathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathamnkshĂ«ro|goshangathamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathamshĂ«ro|gokishangathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathamshĂ«mu|shangathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathamnkshĂ«mu|goshangathamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathamshĂ«mu|gokishangathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangathamronĂŒ|shangathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangathamnkronĂŒ|goshangathamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathamronĂŒ|gokishangathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangathamroshĂ«|shangathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangathamnkroshĂ«|goshangathamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangathamroshĂ«|gokishangathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathamromu|shangathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathamnkromu|goshangathamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathamromu|gokishangathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangathamunĂŒ|shangathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangathamnkmunĂŒ|goshangathamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathamunĂŒ|gokishangathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangathamushĂ«|shangathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangathamnkmushĂ«|goshangathamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangathamushĂ«|gokishangathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathamuro|shangathamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathamnkmuro|goshangathamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathamuro|gokishangathamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
